opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Treasure Valley Comfort has no booking button, no contact form, and is phone-only.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC customers calling after hours are booking competitors with online scheduling instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget capturing appointment requests 24/7 without phone dependency.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools or CRM detected on site, with no recurring revenue signals evident.
opportunities.observation: Idaho's hot summers and cold winters create two annual tune-up opportunities being left uncaptured.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal reminder campaigns to past customers before Boise's summer and winter demand peaks.

opportunities.label: Call Capture Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with zero CRM or marketing tools detected across the entire website.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call leaves no record, permanently losing that Treasure Valley lead.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture logging caller details, intent, and follow-up tasks into an automated CRM.
